title: Error: key generation failed, unable to read from stderr: exit status 1
body:
### Issue Description

After upgrading from version 4.9.x to 5.2.x I alway got this error when creating the podman default machine :

Error: key generation failed, unable to read from stderr: exit status 1

Command execution failed with exit code 125
Command execution failed with exit code 125
Error: key generation failed, unable to read from stderr: exit status 1

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/0107bf9f-82f3-4866-a084-6d6323787b25)



### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue on a Windows computer
1. Install podman version 4.9.x 
2. Create the podman machine default
3. Install podman v5.2;x
4. Create the podman machine default.


### Describe the results you received

C:\>podman version
Cannot connect to Podman. Please verify your connection to the Linux system using `podman system connection list`, or try `podman machine init` and `podman machine start` to manage a new Linux VM
Error: unable to connect to Podman socket: failed to read identity "C:\\Users\\a017730\\.ssh\\podman-machine-default-vpn": open C:\Users\a017730\.ssh\podman-machine-default-vpn: The system cannot find the file specified.

### Describe the results you expected

At least getting the version number of podman.

### podman info output

```yaml
podman version 5.2.2
Windows 11 23H2 (build 22631.4037)
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body: Have a look at https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/22965, does it work when you run the podman machine init command from the cli?

Hello, this s what I get when I run podman machine init 

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6756f1d7-99ae-4bdd-9d24-5148d422f654)
 
I also explore https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/22965 and i can't find no ssh key
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e262d44b-3507-457e-9106-01f342de968c)

Also any of the suggestions about generating a key is working.

Hello,

I found why it was not working.. the ssh-keygen was creating the key by default in another '.ssh' folder for another software (ie Reflection for zOS).
I've seen this by running twice this command:
**ssh-keygen.exe --% -t dsa -N "" -f stuff**
Second run show a the folder of the previous key to overwrite **and it was not** "%USERPROFILE%/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/"

After uninstalling it and restarting computer the problem is fixed. 
This bug was not present in 4.9.x may be something change or the generation folder can be specified somewhere.

Best Regards.
